medicalBoundary.summary: Herbalisti is an educational research interface only. It does not diagnose, treat, prescribe, or replace professional care.

sourcePolicy.traceability: Every public signal should retain source name, URL, date, source type, and topic tags.
sourcePolicy.conflictHandling: Independent commentary sources with disclosed commercial or biotech conflicts may be labeled and used as commentary, not as primary research evidence.

privacy.publicLaunchDefault: No user accounts, personal health records, payment forms, or private medical intake are collected in the first public launch.
privacy.futureDataCollection: If personal data features are added later, publish a reviewed privacy notice before enabling them.

editorialReview.humanReview: Required before publishing generated videos, medical commentary, protocol-style recommendations, or treatment claims.
